title: Youtube Poop: The Sentence Mixing Collab II
description:
Since you guys liked the first collab so much, I decided to host another!

Ten people joined, but only six managed to get their entry in on time, all different from last time.

Thanks to toadomos, Ourworld319, cantflyman, Masterball1992, erazor521, and RobotComics for making this possible once again!
